name: Favorite Snack Mix
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the cereal, nuts and pretzels.
2. In a small saucepan over low heat, melt the butter.
3. Add brown sugar; cook and stir until dissolved.
4. Pour the melted butter and sugar mixture over the cereal mixture; stir to coat.
5. Place one-third of the mixture in a greased 15x10x1 inch baking pan.
6. Bake at 325 degrees for 8 minutes.
7. Stir and bake for 6 more minutes.
8. Spread on waxed paper to cool.
9. Repeat with remaining mixture.
